name: energy: GB grid frequency (live)
source_note: Elexon Insights (GB electricity system operator data) — fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC — Contains BMRS data © Elexon Limited, 2026 (free licence)

frequency.para1: This chart shows 24 hours of grid frequency — the heartbeat of the power system, which drops when demand outruns supply, in Hz, recorded by a grid frequency sensor — 5,753 measurements, one reading every 15 seconds. This is real, live data from Elexon Insights (GB electricity system operator data), fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.
